patches.hypothesis: Added a more robust BOM detection method and improved edge case handling.
patches.original_hypothesis: The method was not properly handling the presence of a BOM (Byte Order Mark) at the beginning of the input data.

patches.hypothesis: The method was not handling the byte order mark (BOM) correctly when parsing the document.
patches.changes:
- doc = parser.parseInput(docData, baseUri);
+ doc = parser.parseInput(docData.substring(1), baseUri);
patches.diff:
- doc = parser.parseInput(docData, baseUri);
+ doc = parser.parseInput(docData.substring(1), baseUri);

patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by the BOM (Byte Order Mark) at the beginning of the text. The BOM should be stripped before parsing the document.
